files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index b613272..5eb135e 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -61,2 +61,9 @@ Day 56 / Week 8 observations:
 - Usage peaked at 284k/day, within tier-2 capacity. Cash fell about $47k after heavy growth/support/dev spend.
 - Week 8 adjustment: restore A to tier 1 to preserve segmentation, raise B/C to monetize professional users, reduce S1 referral, keep S2 content strong, and increase S2-targeted support.
+
+Day 63 / Week 9 observations:
+- Cash held nearly flat while subscribers grew to 3,258. Subscription payments were $101k against high support/dev/acquisition spend.
+- Restoring A tier 1 improved S2 content mix: 506 A, 325 B, 125 C from paid content. Still many A users, but B/C volume is healthy.
+- Open issues rose to 273, all same-day; ops resolved 1,344 issues. Support volume, not aging, remains the operational limit.
+- Usage peaked at 489k/day, still under tier 2, but continued growth could approach capacity.
+- Week 9 adjustment: keep proven ads, increase support spend, move to tier 3 capacity, and modestly raise A/B prices for new users.
